SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF IVANE JANIASHVILI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PAYWARD, INC. IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
